text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Protein complex prediction with AlphaFold-Multimer" is a real, well-known bioRxiv preprint (DOI: 10.1101/2021.10.04.463034). The cited authors Richard Evans, Michael O'Neill, and Alexander Pritzel are confirmed co-authors of the actual paper, and the venue (bioRxiv) and year (2022, matching the v2 revision date of March 10, 2022) are consistent with the reference.
LINK: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2021.10.04.463034v2
